title: They Lurk.
description: They Lurk everywhere... You better hide, if you can.
body: 💀 They lurk everywhere... Hide while you still can. If you can. # ⚠️WARNING⚠️ This modpack contains **JUMPSCARES**, disturbing sounds and ambient tension. Not for the faint of heart. # Description A lightweight horror modpack to play with your friends, family... Basically anyone. Have a little scare & fun! :) ## 🎃 Includes: - **Lurkers... everywhere.** - **Herobrine** - **Sound-based paranoia** - **World-altering terror** - **Environmental manipulation** And much more. **💡 Heads up: The mod Error 404 Not Found may crash your game intentionally as part of its horror effect. You can disable this by typing /openconfig.** To play on multiplayer, i HIGHLY recommend using the [essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) mod. # 🏆 CREDITS 🏆 https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium https://modrinth.com/mod/end-watchers https://modrinth.com/mod/error-404-not-found https://modrinth.com/mod/face-of-horror https://modrinth.com/mod/friday-the-13th-jason-voorhees https://modrinth.com/mod/from-the-fog https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib https://modrinth.com/mod/haunted-harvest https://modrinth.com/mod/kurolib https://modrinth.com/mod/mindful-darkness https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib https://modrinth.com/mod/slenderman-the-revival https://modrinth.com/mod/sounds-of-the-forest https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight-forge https://modrinth.com/mod/the-anomaly https://modrinth.com/mod/the-boiled-one-reimagined https://modrinth.com/mod/the-box-of-horrors https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bath https://modrinth.com/mod/the-hollow-stalker https://modrinth.com/mod/the-man-from-the-fog https://modrinth.com/mod/true-darkness-forge-updated-fork https://modrinth.com/mod/whispering-spirits
